programme.title: Amor perdido
programme.desc: A beautiful young girl named Amalia.(played by actress Amalia Aguilar). with a talent for Rumba, wants to become a glamorous cabaret singer. Her dream is encouraged by her best friend, Ernesto, (Tito Novaro), who also happens to be a gifted composer. While working towards her career goal, Amalia meets the ultimate "bad-boy", a dashing gangster named Luis, (Victor Junco). She is quickly swept off her feet and falls in love with him. Unfortunately, Luis has a jealous streak and a rather possessive personality, especially when it comes to women. He also has a prior girlfriend named Celia, (Yadira Jimenez). Celia also happens to share similar traits with Luis and is filled with jealous rage toward Amelia. So much so that she causes her rival in love to have an accident which leaves Amalia's face horribly scarred-so much so that she must now wear a mask in public. Filled with shame and fear of rejection, she decides to leave Luis without explanation or saying farewell, Her actions anger her former lover, who thinks she left him for better career opportunities. So, he decides to kill poor disfigured Amalia.

programme.title: Capítulo 139
programme.desc: The Lodge is upset that they failed in getting José expelled. José meets her tutor face to face. Franco finds out that Mia like a man; not a boy at the school. Mia, in anger, tells her father she's in love with Gastón; however Gastón is not worried. Later, when Mia becomes upset at the sight of Viviana with Miguel, Gastón kisses her.

programme.title: Capítulo 140
programme.desc: Gastón kisses Mia for the first time. Franco believes that Alma is cheating on Carlo. Nico tells Teo he might like José more than he knows. Mia tells Gastón she's harassed by Miguel at school. Franco follows the alleged cheater and finds out he's in charge of Mia's model campaign. Raquel and Giovanni begin to date; Tomás and him fight. Teo is saved by a fellow Lodge member. Gastón tells Mia he wants to take care of her for life.

programme.title: Capítulo 141
programme.desc: Teo tells Miguel and Nico that the room guard of the Lodge has a black eye; they look for suspects. Celina becomes depressed because of her break up with Augusto; she binge eats. Roberta and Pepa go to Puebla City. León finds out Diego left school.

programme.title: Capítulo 142
programme.desc: León reveals to Mabel that Paola is a prostitute. Giovanni lies to Raquel about his family, saying they're royalty. José tries to help Celina with the PE test. Mia forgets to do her math homework; Gastón brings it to class completed. Renata makes the students participate in a math competition. Celina gets injured during the test. Mia angers Gastón when she goes to Madariaga for help. León finds Diego with Roberta at the hotel.

programme.title: Capítulo 143
programme.desc: Pilar tries to get Lupita and Tomás together for hidden reasons. Paola rejects Diego after seeing León. Miguel, Nico, and Teo plan to follow Tomás and Giovanni to see which is in the Lodge. Giovanni hires a man to pose as his rich father. León tells Diego that Paola is a whore. Nico and Miguel get ambushed by the suspect. Celina is comforted by Miguel on the subject of image.

programme.title: Capítulo 144
programme.desc: Gastón invites Mia out on a date. Giovanni's fake parents aren't what they seem. Vico follows Celina to find out her secret appointment. Carlo tells Roberta he has a surprise for her. Franco and Valeria come to see if Mia lied about staying at school so she could go out with Gastón.

programme.title: Capítulo 145
programme.desc: Carlo and Roberta go drag racing. Giovanni tries to ride a horse. Vico realizes the place Celina visited. Nico tries to ruin Lupita's date. León has Diego fight his anger out. Raquel finds out Giovanni lied. Diego give Nico his guitar; Nico sees the matching shoes in Diego, Tomás, Giovanni's room. Roberta and Carlo are arrested; revealing Mia's lie.

programme.title: Capítulo 146
programme.desc: Franco finds out Mia isn't with Carlo and Roberta. Paola begs for Diego's forgiveness, which he gives, but refuses to take her back. Mia and Gastón go out on a date. Vico calls Celina's mom to stop her from making a life change. Carlo and Robert go search for Mia. Celina's mom sets her up on a date; however, the date proves to be beneficial to Celina. Roberta ruins Simon's date by saying she's pregnant and underage.

programme.title: Capítulo 147
programme.desc: Nico breaks up with Karen. Gastón tells Mia he wants to speak to her dad. Teo receives a gift. Simon plans to get Roberta back for flattening his tires. Paola lies to Roberta that her and Diego are back together to get revenge. Miguel tells Teo he will take his place at the Lodge initiation.

programme.title: Una de terror
programme.desc: Silvita trata de mantener limpios los pasillos del edificio, ya que Lorena y Magdalena sacaron todas sus macetas. Mientras Luis trabaja, Pedro y Cris verán una película.

programme.title: Bibi maneja
programme.desc: Bibi quiere aprender a conducir, lo que a los P. Luche les parece una excelente idea, solo para que Bibi se convierta en su chofer. Sin embargo, cuando llevan esto al extremo, Bibi sufre un pequeño accidente.

programme.title: El funeral del Merengues
programme.desc: En el velorio de Merengueti, un empleado de Industrias Camerino, Ludovico se da cuenta de que el cadáver tiene el reloj que perdió en la mañana e intenta quitárselo.

programme.title: Federica ardiente
programme.desc: Federica consigue un nuevo y muy secreto trabajo. Cuando Ludovico se entera de que ella lo consiguió a través de un antiguo ex, entra en desconfianza, pero es hasta que la escucha haciendo una llamada indecente, que descubre ese nuevo trabajo.

programme.title: La boda de Régulo
programme.desc: Ludovico se autoinvita a la boda de Régulo, un compañero de trabajo, sin darse cuenta de que éste lo detesta. Ludovico llega a la boda acompañado de toda su familia, y evidentemente hace un caos.

programme.title: El loco corte de pelo
programme.desc: Abrumada por sus inseguridades, Federica decide hacerse un arriesgado cambio de look. Sin embargo, antes de hacérselo lo consulta con Ludovico, quien no presta atención y le dice que sí lo haga. El resultado es que Federica se desgracia la cabellera justo el día que tiene una cena con excompañeros del colegio.

programme.title: El genio bursátil
programme.desc: Ludovico se mete en problemas en su trabajo cuando, por impertinente, trata de ayudar a Don Camerino en unos temas financieros. Tratando de solucionar el enredo, Ludovico complica todo aún más. Finalmente, y a punto de que ocurra un desastre financiero, Ludovico acude a la única persona que lo puede ayudar: Júnior.

programme.title: Los Juniors de satélite
programme.desc: Maria goes to a night club with her friends but the boys that invited them stick them the bill.

programme.title: Carnes frías
programme.desc: Rosa cambia el viejo refrigerador de Doña Lucha por uno de nueva tecnología y además parlante, lo cual vuelve loca a Lucha. Maria sorprende a Alberto acaramelado con Gloria y de celos inicia una competencia con Betsabé por un chico guapo.

programme.title: Placentex antiesponge
programme.desc: Rosa recomienda a su hermano Albertano para presentar el nuevo shampoo Placentex Antiesponge. Maria le plancha el uniforme de Elvis y provoca los celos de Doña Lucha, que se lo arruga.

programme.title: Domingo en Chapultepec
programme.desc: Maria goes with El Chino to a museum for a school trip but she and Albertano ditch the boy to spend the afternoon in the Chapultepec park.

programme.title: La noche de la langosta

programme.title: El rap de Doña Juana

programme.title: La novia de Pedro
programme.desc: Pedro invita a salir a Cris, la mejor amiga de Silvia, y organiza una cita doble con Luis y Silvita. La alcaldía instala una cámara de fotomultas y los flashazos apuntan directo al edificio.

programme.title: En una relación
programme.desc: Después de un tiempo de salir juntos, Luis le pregunta a Silvia qué son y quiere que se decida de una vez. La alcaldía instala lámparas de led en el alumbrado público y la no deja dormir a los vecinos.

programme.title: Beso fallido
programme.desc: Luis invita a Silvia a ver una película a su casa, pero Pedro interrumpirá su romántico momento, pues quiere recuperar su tele. Por otra parte, Arturo jugará póker con Germán, Jorjais y Benito.

programme.title: Las pantuflas de Luis
programme.desc: Luis y Pedro hacen una apuesta para saber si se dice pantuflas o pantunflas y le preguntarán a todos los vecinos. Lorena sospecha que Benito está molesto por su nuevo galán.

programme.title: Segundo aire
programme.desc: Germán descubre que en el edificio hay una plaga de cucarachas, por lo que Magdalena le ordena que haga una inspección en su departamento.

programme.title: Número equivocado
programme.desc: Alguien grafiteó la fachada del edificio. Para retirarlo, Germán cambia el número de la entrada. ¿Recibirá Luis el paquete que espera? ¿Acudirán a pintar el departamento de Lorena?

programme.title: Magdalena y la tercera edad
programme.desc: Magdalena descubre que las personas de tercera edad recibirán tarjetas de ayuda. La familia López Pérez intenta obtener el beneficio. A Luis le molesta que Benito tenga un auto nuevo.

programme.title: Cásate conmigo
programme.desc: Comienza una guerra tras la pelea entre Silvia y Luis, sin embargo él le pide matrimonio. Lorena le pide a Germán que arregle una mesa.

programme.title: La boda
programme.desc: Luis y Silvia anuncian su boda y los vecinos los convencerán para que se casen en el edificio y ayudarán a los preparativos.

programme.title: Vecinos ruidosos
programme.desc: Los vecinos se quejan de los ruidos que vienen del departamento de Luis y Silvita, Germán intenta reparar la tubería de Lorena y los López Pérez sufren de comezón.

programme.title: Frankie regresa
programme.desc: Frankie regresa a vivir al edificio, con Lorena y con Benito, pero con la condición de que encuentre trabajo. Pero, en vez de eso, escribirá una nueva película.

programme.title: La llegada de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa vuelve al edificio para visitar a los Vecinos y ponerse al corriente. Benito invita a su novia a "ver pelis" en el departamento, al enterarse de que sus papás saldrán.

programme.title: La cocina de Silvita
programme.desc: Como Luis le ha preparado el desayuno, Silvita se encargará de prepararle a su esposo un platillo espectacular.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: La cosas de Don Roque
programme.desc: Germán le entrega a Vanessa cosas que le dejó don Roque, por lo que ambos lo recuerdan y homenajean. Lorena aprecia a Soledad, la nueva amiga de Benito.

programme.title: El tamalero
programme.desc: Como el tamalero no deja dormir a Luis, este le pedirá que le baje a su bocina. Ve cuántos enemigos se echará encima, por dejar sin trabajo al tamalero.

programme.title: Los paramédicos
programme.desc: Por pedirle a Morris que ponga en su tarea que son paramédicos, Rocko y Ale deben ir a la escuela a dar un curso de primeros auxilios. Llegan nuevos vecinos al departamento 301.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: What a Day (Trump’s Senioritis)
programme.desc:
On today’s show, we are diving into the tough week our commander in chief just had. From MMA fights no one seems very excited about… to the potential end of warrantless surveillance because of an unpopular Trump hire, our dear president has been taking some big losses. Oh, and not to mention, the war with Iran is still going on. But Trump doesn’t seem to care about any of it! So to talk more about Donald Trump’s apparent case of senioritis, we called up Tim Miller, host of The Bulwark Podcast.
And in headlines: Elon Musk becomes the world’s first trillionaire, a poll finds Trump is losing favor with Independents, and a federal judge agrees to extend a court-ordered block on Trump’s $1.8 billion slush fund.

programme.title: Offline with Jon Favreau (Has The Left Finally Figured Out the Internet?)
programme.desc: Ever heard a popular TikToker wax poetic about who they’re voting for? They might be getting paid…and not disclosing by whom. Kyle Tharp, author of the Chaotic Era newsletter, joins Offline to discuss the emergence of pay-for-play political influencers and whether Democrats have made any progress in figuring out the internet. He and Jon talk about the decline of Ben Shapiro and the Daily Wire, the new success of legacy media on TikTok, and the intense grassroots anger around data centers.

programme.desc: With startling new information about the shapeshifter, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) hurry to protect their friends while Allison (Crystal Reed) is given an investigative task by her family. And there is "panic at the disco."

programme.title: Restraint
programme.desc: Lydia (Holland Roden) makes connections about the bite from Peter (Ian Bohen). Jackson (Colton Haynes) causes problems for Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) while Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) has a crisis of faith in his leadership abilities.

programme.title: Raving
programme.desc: During a secret concert, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) come up with a method to trap the new shapeshifter. At the same time, Allison's mother (Eaddy Mays) comes up with a plan of her own to take care of Scott once and for all.

programme.title: Party Guessed
programme.desc: Even as his relationship with Allison (Crystal Reed) is further strained, Scott (Tyler Posey) must attend Lydia's (Holland Roden) birthday party while Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) locks up his new wolves on their first full moon together.

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: With a secret revealed, Scott (Tyler Posey), Stiles (Dylan O'Brien), Melissa and Stilinski are taken hostage in the Sheriff's station. Allison (Crystal Reed) then tracks Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) to the station, bringing Argent and Gerard with her.

programme.title: Battlefield
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) must help win the championship lacrosse game while also trying to figure out how to stop Gerard (Michael Hogan). At the same time, Alison (Crystal Reed) and Argent (JR Bourne) continue their hunt of Derek (Tyler Hoechlin).

programme.title: Master Plan
programme.desc: In the second season finale, although everyone is still reeling from a shocking death on the lacrosse field, Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends rush to figure out Gerard's (Michael Hogan) master plan…but Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) has his own plan.

programme.title: Tattoo
programme.desc: In the exciting Season 3 premiere, a new Alpha Pack arrives to wreak havoc on Scott's (Tyler Posey) life, while Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) and Isaac (Daniel Sharman) struggle to locate Erica (Gage Golightly) and Boyd (Sinqua Walls).

programme.title: Chaos Rising
programme.desc: Allison and Lydia stumble on a clue to finding Boyd and Erica, while a childhood friend of Stiles goes missing. Meanwhile, Derek is surprised by the reappearance of someone from his past…someone he thought had died in the Hale house fire.

programme.title: You're So Agreeable
programme.desc: Darrin is freed from his agreeable spell and gets his old job back.

programme.title: Chorus Line Angels
programme.desc: The Angels are hired by Ruth Traina, who has invested $150,000 in a Darian Mason Production, to investigate the disappearance of two of the best dancers. Kelly auditions a job as a dancer; Julie is her agent/manager and Kris poses as a writer/critic doing a story on Mason. Another of the better dancers, Nancy, disappears after being caught going through Mason's files. Mason then catches Kris going through his files and threatens her. The Angels and Bosley find that Mason has deliberately hired theinexperienced and gotten rid of the good ones to make the audition a failure, since he can't possibly pay off all of his investors. Kelly and Julie come to Kris' rescue. They then find and free the three missing dancers. The cast, including Kelly, decide to go through the audition since they feel that they owe it to themselves to at least try. The Las Vegas executives they audition for express great interest in the dancers.

programme.title: Stuntwoman Angels
programme.desc: Motion picture executive Jonathan Tobias hires Bosley and the Angels to track down someone dressed as one of Robin Hood's Merry Men who has been shooting arrows into studio personnel. Tobias knows that the arrows are aimed at him when his chauffeur is hit. Charlie arranges for the Angels to enroll in stunt school and then go to work as stuntwomen on a picture called "Marian and her Merry Maids" -- a bad remake of an old Errol Flynn classic. The Angels become friendly with one of the maids, Ellen Travers, and her husband, Jeff. Ellen, a former rodeo queen, has become enamored with movies. Jeff is trying desperately to get her to quit the movies and go back home with him. Bosley learns that one of the security guards, Jake Webner, was in the original picture with his idol -- Errol Flynn. Ellen Travers is hit with an arrow while driving a wagon during one of the scenes. It is Jake who has been dressing as Robin Hood's man with the bow and arrow, trying to get to Tobias because he feels that Tobias has been making bad movies. Jake is eventually caught while shooting an arrow into the director's foot. However, Bosley discovers that Jake was on guard duty when Ellen Travers was shot. Her husband, Jeff, who was trying to scare her into giving up movies, really shot her. Jake and Jeff are both taken into custody.

programme.title: Attack Angels
programme.desc: Edward Tustin, head of a group trying to take over Western Techtronics, engages efficiency expert, Dr. John Reardon of Executive Assistants, to have the four members of Techtronics who oppose his takeover killed. Reardon has hypnotized three girls for the job; Darlene Warren, Cynthia Weaver and Francine Miller. He uses motivational Pavlovian and Sensory conditioning and the subjects kill without fear, passion or memory. After the Chairman of the Board and a Vice President of Techtronics are killed and Francine Miller's body is found with them, the Angels are hired by company President, Steve Briggs. Briggs realizes he is next on the list. Kelly and Kris join Techtronics as executive trainees and Julie applies as Executive Assistant. She is hypnotized by Dr. Reardon, who uses flashing strobe effects, a candle and a water tank. After Julie has become completely programmed, she is sent to kill Briggs and almost succeeds when the suspicious Kelly and Kris arrive and save him. Julie is then deprogrammed by a doctor who explains that fire and water are two of the strongest hypnotic symbols. Reardon, Tustin and their associates are taken into custody.

programme.title: Angel On A Roll
programme.desc: After twelve different banks have been robbed of a quarter of a million dollars in hundred dollar bills, the Angels are called in to investigate. All the banks have the same type of automatic teller. Ted Markham, a computer and electronics genius who designed and installed the automatic tellers, has quit his job. Kris volunteers to become acquainted with Markham with the intention of obtaining some of the bills so that the serial numbers may be traced. Kris follows Markham to a poker parlor where he takes out a stack of $100 bills and with the help of a wrist calculator is a big winner. Ted and Kris are attracted to each other and they take off for Las Vegas in Kris' car. While in Las Vegas, Kris manages to get some of the bills away from Ted. She phones the serial numbers to Bosley and soon learns that they are part of the missing money. After Ted has won $300,000, he is asked to leave Las Vegas by the casino owner. On the way out of town, Ted stops at a bank while Kris waits in the car. When they arrive back in California, at the spot where Ted left his car, Kelly, Julie and Bosley are waiting with the police to take Ted into custody. Bosley then finds that Ted is free to go due to the fact that when he deposited the money in the bank in Las Vegas, he had paid back each of the twelve banks with interest, and they will not prosecute. Even though Ted and Kris have strong feelings for each other, they realize their relationship would not be the same -- so they sadly part.

programme.title: Mr. Galaxy
programme.desc: Ron Gates, a young body builder, has several accidents while training with his manager, Artie Weaver, for the Mr. Galaxy title. The Angels are called in to find out who is trying to injure Ron. One of the suspects is the current Mr. Galaxy, Chuck Wilde. Another is Wilde's manager, Norman Powers. Another suspect is Danny Barr, owner of the arena with heavy underworld connections. At one time Ron Gates was a boxer who had a management contract with Barr, but who, after almost killing another boxer, quit boxing and took up body building. Barr has always been angry with Ron for walking out on him. Kris stays close to Ron to keep her eye on him. Kelly poses as a staff reporter for a leading body building magazine. Julie and Bosley are customers at the gym called Sportworld. Selena Hansen, the wife of the boxer Ron Gates almost killed, is also a suspect. Ron keeps away from all confrontations, and when Kris questions why he doesn't defend himself, he says he will never hit anyone again. Ron ultimately wins the Mr. Galaxy title. After several more brushes with death, the Angels discover it is Danny Barr who has been trying to get rid of Ron and he is taken into custody.

programme.title: He Married An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels are hired by Barbara Stone and her sister, Jane, to track down John Thornwood. He has swindled them out of $100,000 by promising to marry Jane and persuading her to invest money in a phony South American oil exploration venture. The Angels track Thornwood to an apartment complex. Kris, posing as a confidence artist, rents the apartment next to his. Bosley poses as a Texan from whom she has swindled $50,000. Kris and Thornwood become friends, and he confesses to her that he has another scheme going. Kelly and Julie follow Thornwood to a museum owned by plain-looking Monica Thackery. Thornwood is posing as Professor Thornwood and has asked the smitten Monica to marry him and deposit $150,000 to an account supposedly for importing some pieces of art. Charlie, Bosley and the Angels find that Monica is the daughter of an eastern syndicate head, Joe Fenell. Thornwood is planning a phony marriage ceremony with Monica and then to withdraw the money and run. The Angels trick Thornwood into a real marriage with Monica because she is so much in love with him. They figure that her father will keep Thornwood in line. Thornwood, finding that he has been tricked, tries to escape, but is caught by Joe Fenell and his henchmen. Fenell warns him to be good to Monica or else. Thornwood knows that he has to stick with Monica and be a good husband...or else.

programme.title: Taxi Angels
programme.desc: The Angels are called in to investigate, when Tom Archer, who owns a cab company with his wife Laurie, is badly burned as his cab explodes. Laurie Archer reveals that they have been getting threatening phone calls and someone obviously is trying to put them out of business. Kris takes a job as a waitress across the street from the cab garage. Julie becomes a driver and Kelly, a dispatcher. Two employees, Jake Barnett, ex-con, and Sarge, a shell-shocked hallucinating casualty of World War II, are both under suspicion. It seems Tom Archer had fired Sarge and advised him to go to the V.A. hospital for treatment. Later, Julie's cab catches fire and she and her passenger escape just in time. Jake advises Julie that Sarge's ex-wife was killed by a cab and he is starting the fires to put Tom and Laurie's cab company out of business. The Angels go to Sarge's room, but he escapes through a window, goes up on the roof, and tries to jump to the next building. He misses and is killed. The Angels then find out that Sarge's wife was not killed by a cab. Instead, the woman who Jake lived with was the victim of the accident. Julie takes Jake out in her cab with a tape recorder on -- the others listening -- and gets Jake to admit that he is really the guilty one. He takes off in the cab -- Kris arrives and she and Julie pursue him and trap him at the Los Angeles River. The other Angels praise Julie for her driving expertise and she admits she learned it from an old boyfriend in her neighborhood who drove stolen cars.

programme.title: Angel On The Line
programme.desc: Mary and her very attractive friend, Lois, go to the Hot Line Club, a singles club with a phone at each table. The phone rings and the caller asks to speak to Lois. He then tells her that she is so pretty he has to kill her. Lois leaves the club. She is followed, and in an effort to escape, runs in front of a car, is hit and killed. Mary calls in the Angels to investigate. They all go to the Hot Line Club. The entertainment is hypnotist, Margo, who gets Kelly into the act. Kelly later gives Margo her business card. Afterwards, Kelly sits with Mary. Soon the phone rings and Mary answers. The voice asks to speak with Kelly. When she gets on, he tells her that she is so pretty he has to kill her. Mary recognizes it as the same voice that called Lois. When Kelly leaves the club, she sees a car following her and writes down the license number. Later she is contacted by a man named Edward Ford who says he is a writer. He tells Kelly that Margo gave him her name and number. They arrange to meet for lunch. Kelly is suspicious of him and contacts the other Angels who find out that his car is registered in the name of Paul Factor. Kelly leaves the luncheon and goes back to the Hot Line Club in an effort to get information about Ford from Margo. When Margo arrives, she takes Kelly out to a back alley, pulls a knife and tries to stab her. The Angels and Bosley arrive in time to rescue her. During the struggle, Margo's wig and false eyelashes come off, revealing "her" to be Edward Ford who really is Paul Factor.

programme.title: Chorus Line Angels
programme.desc: The Angels are hired by Ruth Traina, who has invested $150,000 in a Darian Mason Production, to investigate the disappearance of two of the best dancers. Kelly auditions a job as a dancer; Julie is her agent/manager and Kris poses as a writer/critic doing a story on Mason. Another of the better dancers, Nancy, disappears after being caught going through Mason's files. Mason then catches Kris going through his files and threatens her. The Angels and Bosley find that Mason has deliberately hired theinexperienced and gotten rid of the good ones to make the audition a failure, since he can't possibly pay off all of his investors. Kelly and Julie come to Kris' rescue. They then find and free the three missing dancers. The cast, including Kelly, decide to go through the audition since they feel that they owe it to themselves to at least try. The Las Vegas executives they audition for express great interest in the dancers.

programme.title: A Prize In Each And Every Package
programme.desc: All that glitters is not frosted cereal. After a jewelry heist in Chicago, the robbers foolishly stash their booty in the grain bin of a cereal manufacturer. Oliver and Lisa discover the jewels in their bowl of Crickly Wickly!

programme.title: Law Partners
programme.desc: Oliver Wendell Douglas returns from farm to firm... law firm, that is. When a young and ambitious local graduates from law school, he looks for a potential partner in Hooterville. Oliver is the logical choice. Lisa and Eb help the new venture.

programme.title: A Day In The Life Of Oliver Wendell Holmes
programme.desc: After partnering with a young, local lawyer, Oliver has opened a new law office in Hooterville. However, their secretary, Lisa, shows a lack of necessary skills. Soon, Lisa's job is on the line, even if she is married to one of the partners.

programme.title: Economy Flight To Washington
programme.desc: When the Young Peoples Agricultural Society holds their annual convention in Washington, D.C., local members Eb, Mr. Kimball, and Arnold the pig get ready to make the big trip. Oliver and Lisa serve as unintended chaperones.

programme.title: Retreat From Washington
programme.desc: While Lisa and Oliver consider what to do on their unplanned trip to Washington D.C., Mr. Haney rents their house to a family of eight. Meanwhile in the nation's capital, Lisa and Eb tour the White House, and Mr. Kimball makes official trouble.

programme.title: A Hunting We Won't Go
programme.desc: When a charmingly sweet doe wanders onto the Douglas farm, an enchanted Lisa befriends the beautiful animal. Having had her heart won over, Lisa resolves to have all deer hunting banned in Hooterville, winning support however necessary.

programme.title: Eb Uses His Ingenuity
programme.desc: Farmhand Eb plans to take his girlfriend to a fancy restaurant for her birthday. Only problem is he can't afford it. Oliver encourages Eb to get creative and figure out how to earn the money himself. And if Eb is anything, it's creative.

programme.title: The Old Trunk
programme.desc: Lisa becomes enchanted with the diary of a Lydia Plunkett. Found in an old trunk in the barn, the diary from 1898 tells Lydia's life story as a successful businesswoman. Eb and Lisa are glued to every page of the story, but Oliver isn't impressed.

programme.title: The Milk Maker
programme.desc: Mr. Haney and Fred Ziffel try to persuade Oliver to invest in a new business venture. "Looney Luke" Needlinger claim to have invented a machine that can turn hay into fresh milk. Oliver is skeptical and tries to prove the machine is a white lie.

programme.title: Lisa's Mudder Comes For A Visit
programme.desc: Lisa's "Mudder" pays a surprise visit to Lisa and Oliver. Eb good-naturedly introduces her as the Queen of Sicily. As a result, the entire town treats her like royalty. They even go so far as to hold a special day in her honor.

programme.title: Where There's A Will
programme.desc: Arnold Ziffel, Hooterville's beloved swine is thought to have rightful claim to a $20,000 fortune. The Birnbacher pork empire has promised that the descendant of the famous weather-predicting pig, Herman, will inherit the vast sum.

programme.title: A Tale Of A Tail
programme.desc: Oliver, Lisa and Eb travel to Chicago with Arnold to prove the pig is the rightful heir to the Birnbacher pork empire. Will this pig get rich? Arnold makes a surprising prediction that baffles all, including all the lawyers involved.

programme.title: You And Your Big Shrunken Head
programme.desc: When Oliver returns home with Arnold, the citizens in town hold a large reception for Arnold. But when Oliver receives a phone call from a lawyer representing an eccentric relative of the Birnbachers, the riches go into question.

programme.title: The Road
programme.desc: Oliver is mad over the town's dirt road, especially when he finds out that the state set aside money over thirty years ago to fix it. Oliver goes to the Capitol to get the road paved but hits a roadblock when the Ziffels' house must be torn down.

programme.title: The Four Of Spades
programme.desc: Lisa foretells of a mysterious stranger that will appear into Oliver's life. Enter Tadpole Talbot, Eb's childhood friend who has become a singing sensation. Tadpole has convinced Eb to go out on the road with him and join his band as a roadie.

programme.title: The Youth Center
programme.desc: Oliver become alarmed that the youth of his beloved town, Hooterville is dwindling so he calls an emergency town meeting to prevent them from leaving. The next thing Oliver knows is that his barn has been volunteered for the new youth center.

programme.title: Oliver's School Girl Crush
programme.desc: Oliver is asked to speak at the local high school about his illustrious law career and makes quite an impression on student Kathy Baxter. Oliver must contend with Kathy's fawning as well as her jealous boyfriend is not very happy with Oliver.

programme.title: The Addams Policy
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson, the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: Lurch's Grand Romance
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler in to a new personality.

programme.title: Ophelia's Career
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family Goes To School
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: Morticia And The Psychiatrist
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: Fester's Punctured Romance
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: Gomez, The Politician
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family Tree
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: Morticia Joins The Ladies League
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where he is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: Halloween With The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: Green Eyed Gomez
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: New Neighbors Meet The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: Wednesday Leaves Home
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets The V.I.P.'s
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: Morticia, The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: Lurch Learns To Dance
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion, after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: Art And The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: ZZ Top - Live at Montreux

programme.title: The Most Important Daily Habits For Health & Longevity
programme.desc: Determining the best actions to take for enhancing our health and extending our lives has grown more challenging. There are an unlimited number of wellness approaches at our disposal, thankfully Dr Patrick has dedicated her professional life to identifying the most evidence-based strategies for improving our health and longevity. Expect to learn if low omega 3s are worse for you than smoking cigarettes, what Rhonda's thoughts are on vaping and nicotine, the best foods to boost your metabolism, the once a week workout that can de-age your heart by 20 years, how to get the benefits of heat exposure if you don't have a sauna, the terrifying health risks of being too sedentary and much more...

programme.title: Why Fear & Horror Feels Kinda Good
programme.desc: Why are we drawn to fear? This fascination often balances us the edge of life and death, infused with a dash of excitement. From his beginnings as a Navy SEAL to becoming a renowned YouTuber, Mr. Ballen possesses a unique storytelling talent. He captivates us with some of the most spine-chilling true stories, drawn both from his experiences and the lives of others. Expect to learn why so many people are obsessed with True Crime and scary stories, the 3 terrifying but true stories MrBallen has prepared in this episode today, what being a NAVY Seal taught MrBallen about life & the backlash he has gotten from the NAVY Seal community by sharing his story, what it means to live a good life, if there is life after death, how to reinvent your entire life, what it takes to tell a good story and much more...

programme.title: The Biology Of Focus, Success & Long-Term Energy

programme.title: Amor perdido
programme.desc: A beautiful young girl named Amalia.(played by actress Amalia Aguilar). with a talent for Rumba, wants to become a glamorous cabaret singer. Her dream is encouraged by her best friend, Ernesto, (Tito Novaro), who also happens to be a gifted composer. While working towards her career goal, Amalia meets the ultimate "bad-boy", a dashing gangster named Luis, (Victor Junco). She is quickly swept off her feet and falls in love with him. Unfortunately, Luis has a jealous streak and a rather possessive personality, especially when it comes to women. He also has a prior girlfriend named Celia, (Yadira Jimenez). Celia also happens to share similar traits with Luis and is filled with jealous rage toward Amelia. So much so that she causes her rival in love to have an accident which leaves Amalia's face horribly scarred-so much so that she must now wear a mask in public. Filled with shame and fear of rejection, she decides to leave Luis without explanation or saying farewell, Her actions anger her former lover, who thinks she left him for better career opportunities. So, he decides to kill poor disfigured Amalia.
